creator: josiaslg@bsd.com.br
text:
Geom devices not available on system OS. 
Problem in AHCI driver attach. 

Message:

ahci0: <ATI IXP700 AHCI SATA controller> port 0x4020-0x4027,0x4040-0x4043,0x4028-0x402f,0x4044-0x4047,0x4000-0x400f at device 17.
0 on pci0
ahci0: 0x400 bytes of rid 0x24 res 3 failed (0, 0xffffffff).
device_attach: ahci0 attach returned 6

Better and full dmesg here:

http://pastebin.com/9BUxU94n

How-To-Repeat: This board is from PC Engines (the new apu board) and will substitute the Alix platform. 
Just install FreeBSD 9.2 or 10.0
Detail: 
# Put FC ports in initiator mode
hint.isp.0.role=2
hint.isp.1.role=2
hint.isp.2.role=2
hint.isp.3.role=2

This will allow boot the kernel without freezing.
